rationale: This statute governs the Compensatory Education Allotment Advisory Committee's composition and rulemaking duties. It does not reference homestead exemptions or property tax appraisal values, so the proposed change creates no direct conflict.
quote: The commissioner shall establish an advisory committee to advise the agency in adopting rules for the compensatory education allotment under Section 48.104
_note: No direct conflict. Indirect fiscal linkage to school finance may exist but is not addressed by this statute's operative text.
